title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Red Express - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Red Express - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Red Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Red Express:
Red Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Red Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
